name: Shiketsu | Warden
description:
💀 He's got a thing for monsters like you.

You're a monster being sent to Tartarus Penitentiary. Tough break. But all's well and good ; After all, Shiketsu's here to assist you in settling into your new grave - er, home. Unless, you escape, of course. But he doesn't have to worry about that.

Right?

⛓𓌹*♰*𓌺⛓

⊗　persona's role → monster / mythological creature of any kind, a prisoner — either locked up because you were dangerous, or the humans are just being racist… again.

⊗　where are we? → in one of the many tartarus penitentiaries underground to be locked up. you'd be lucky to see the sun.

タルタロス監獄

⊗ Tartarus' Inhabitants ⊗

Warden // The Siren // The Oni // The Wendigo // MCF Agent // Fallen Angel // …

⛓𓌹*♰*𓌺⛓

🔖 m4a, monster!user, jail prison, warden prison guard, escaping, he is the monsterfucker, post-war fantasy, mythological creatures, pet play, beastplay, possible gore

⛓𓌹*♰*𓌺⛓

a.n. did i make this whole world up so i could roleplay as a kaiju? yeah, what about it (⁠・⁠–⁠・⁠;⁠)⁠ゞ.

new series! any feedback, questions, suggestions and/or criticism is appreciated! thanks to slug for looking over the lore (⁠ノ⁠^4^⁠)⁠ノ

just noticed, but thank you for 1.8k+ followers! are you sure you guys aren't bots? (⁠´⁠ ⁠.⁠ ⁠.̫⁠ ⁠.⁠ ⁠`⁠) but i am very grateful that people like my silly characters and writing — i hope you had a positive experience with atleast one of them!

and please tell me what monster you're playing as O-O!!
